title: Patients
subtitle: Manage patient records
name: Name

referralsTab.title: Cross-hospital referrals
referralsTab.subtitle: Every referral involving this patient, across all hospitals.
referralsTab.empty: No referrals for this patient yet.

searchRegistrySubheading: Find a Syrian patient by national ID or name, regardless of which hospital they are registered at.
noNationalIdMatch: No patient found with this national ID.
registeringNewNationalDesc: This patient is not yet in the national registry. They will be added and linked to this hospital.
loginCredentialsHelp: Create a login so the patient can access their portal. Leave blank to skip.
crossHospitalInformational: This patient has a record at other hospitals. Those records are not visible here until a referral is issued (Phase 5).
onlyHereSoFar: Currently registered only at this hospital.
nationalRegistrySubtitle: Manage unified patient identities across hospitals.
nationalPatientDetailsDesc: Demographics and all hospital registrations for this NHID.
registryLoadError: Could not load this national patient record.
noHospitalsRegistered: Not registered at any hospital yet.
mergeDescription: Combine two national patient records that were accidentally created for the same person. All hospital profiles will be moved to the winner and the loser record will be deleted.
mergeWarning: This action cannot be undone. The loser record and its identifiers (including Syrian national ID) will be permanently removed.
winnerDescription: The record that will be kept.
loserDescription: The record that will be merged into the winner and deleted.
mergeSameIdError: Winner and loser must be different records.
selectWinnerDesc: This is the record that will be kept.
selectLoserDesc: This is the record that will be merged and deleted.
loserPreviewDesc: These {{count}} profile(s) will be reassigned to the winner (or merged if the winner already has a profile at the same hospital).
